texts.content:
Metro Transit – Route 42 Schedule Change

Effective November 1, Route 42 will operate on a modified weekday schedule.

Morning peak hours (6:00–9:00 AM): Buses every 12 minutes
Midday (9:00 AM–3:00 PM): Buses every 20 minutes
Evening peak (3:00–7:00 PM): Buses every 15 minutes

The last bus from Downtown Terminal will depart at 11:30 PM instead of midnight.

Weekend schedules remain unchanged.

Downtown Parking Garage – Rate Adjustment

Starting November 1:

0–1 hour: $4 (was $3)
1–3 hours: $8 (was $6)
3–5 hours: $12 (was $10)
5+ hours: $18 (was $15)

Monthly pass holders are not affected by this rate change.

Validation is available at participating retailers for up to 2 hours of free parking.

questions.stem: How frequently do Route 42 buses run during morning peak hours?
questions.explanation: The notice states that morning peak hours have buses every 12 minutes.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about Route 42 service on Saturdays?
options: A. It follows the new modified weekday schedule
B. It does not operate on weekends
C. It uses the same schedule as before November 1
D. Buses run more frequently than on weekdays
questions.explanation: The notice states that 'weekend schedules remain unchanged.'

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of the parking garage notice?
options: A. To announce a temporary closure
B. To inform drivers of increased parking fees
C. To promote monthly pass subscriptions
D. To limit parking to retail customers only
questions.explanation: The notice details new, higher rates for all parking duration tiers.

questions.stem: If a driver parks for 4 hours, how much more will they pay under the new rates?
questions.explanation: The 3–5 hour rate increased from $10 to $12, a difference of $2.

questions.stem: Which group is exempt from the parking rate increase?
questions.explanation: The notice explicitly states that 'monthly pass holders are not affected by this rate change.'

questions.stem: The word 'validation' in the parking notice is closest in meaning to:
options: A. confirmation of parking from a store
questions.explanation: Parking validation is a stamp or confirmation from a retailer that entitles a driver to reduced or free parking.
